revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24598347618|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[commons:Category:Ahita-jinja]][[ja:阿比太神社]] {{Expand Japanese|阿比太神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Ahita Shrine | native_name = 阿比太神社 | image = Ahita-jinja haiden.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Ahita Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.825237|135.456566}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo|ar|سوسانو|azb|سوسانو|bcl|Susanoo|be|Сусанаа|bg|Сусаноо|ca|Susanoo|cs|Susanoo|da|Susa-no-o|de|Susanoo|el|Σουσάνoο|en|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|eo|Susanoo|es|Susanoo|eu|Susanoo|fa|سوسانو (خدا)|fi|Susanoo|fr|Susanoo|hr|Susano|hu|Szuszanoo|hy|Սուսանո|id|Susanoo|it|Susanoo|ja|スサノオ|ka|სუსანოო-ნო-მიკოტო|ko|스사노오|la|Susano'o|lb|Susanoo|mni|ꯁꯨꯁꯅꯨ-ꯅꯣ-ꯃꯤꯀꯣꯇꯣ|nl|Susanoo|pl|Susanoo|pt|Susanoo|ro|Susanoo|ru|Сусаноо|simple|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|sl|Susanovo|sr|Сусаноо|su|Susanoo|sv|Susanoo|ta|சுசானவோ|th|ซูซาโนโอะ|tr|Susanoo|uk|Сусаноо|vi|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|zh_min_nan|Susanoo|zh|素戔嗚尊|qid=Q272993|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} | website = {{Official website|https://abita.or.jp/}} }} {{nihongo|'''Ahita Shrine'''|阿比太神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Settsu Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|lt=Shikinai Taisha|en|Shikinai Taisha|ja|式内大社|simple|Shikinai Taisha|qid=Q134917288|1=Shikinai Taisha}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings|lt=Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings|qid=Q135009132|1=Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings}} * {{ill|Kanpei-sha|lt=Kanpei-sha|simple|Kanpei-sha (Engishiki Jinmyocho)|qid=Q135160338|1=Kanpei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * {{ill|Shikinai Hiteisha|lt=Shikinai Hiteisha|ja|比定社|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Settsu Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Settsu Province|ja|摂津国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11498550|1=List of Shikinaisha in Settsu Province}} ** Series ordinal: 39 ** P155: {{ill|Tarumi Shrine|lt=Tarumi Shrine|ja|垂水神社 (吹田市)|qid=Q11425829|1=Tarumi Shrine (Q11425829)}} ** P156: {{ill|Isagu Shrine|lt=Isagu Shrine|ja|伊佐具神社|qid=Q11378870|1=Isagu Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Minoh|lt=Minoh|ar|مينوه (أوساكا)|arz|مينوه|ca|Minō|ceb|Minoo Shi|ce|Миноо|de|Minō|en|Minoh|envoyage|Minō|eo|Minoo (urbo)|es|Minō|fa|مینو، location (P625) == * {{coord|34.825237|135.456566}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == official website (P856) == * https://abita.or.jp/ ** Language of work: {{ill|Japanese ᥓᥣᥱ ᥙᥣᥢᥱ|tet|Japaun|te|జపాన్|tg|Ҷопон|th|ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|thnews|หมวดหมู่:ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|tig|ጃፓን|ti|ጃፓን|tk|Ýaponiýa|tl|Hapon|tly|Japonijə|tn|Japan|tok|ma Nijon|to|Siapani|tpi|Siapan|trv|Tanah Bản|vibooks|Các quốc gia/Nhật Bản|vivoyage|Nhật Bản|vls|Japan|vo|Yapän|war|Hapon|wa|Djapon|wo|Sapoŋ|wuu|日本|xal|Ниxуудин Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 4120905003346 == Commons category (P373) == * Ahita-jinja == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '大阪府箕面市桜ヶ丘1-8-1', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Ahita-jinja}} [[JA:阿比太神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11657481}} == Japanese content == {{Shrine |Name = Ahita Shrine |Image = [[File:Ahita Shrine Haiden - DCBVggpUIAA6uuJ.jpg|280px]]
Worship hall |Location = {{ill|lt=Osaka Prefecture|Q122723|qid=Q122723|1=Osaka Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Minoh City|Q665097|qid=Q665097|1=Minoh}} Sakuragaoka 1-8-1 |Coordinates = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |Enshrined deity = {{ill|lt=Susanoo|Q272993|qid=Q272993|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} |Shrine rank = {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} (Major)
Former {{ill|lt=Modern shrine ranking system#Minor shrines|Q712534|qid=Q712534|lt=Village Shrine|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}
{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shinsen Heihaku-ryō Kyōshinsha|1=UNKNOWN}} |Founded = 3rd year of {{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|qid=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}} |Main hall = {{ill|lt=Nagare-zukuri|Q210684|qid=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}} with persimmon-bark roofing |Other name = Gozu Tennō |Pilgrimage etc. = |Annual festival = {{ill|lt=October 23|Q2958|qid=Q2958|1=October 23}} |Rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Osaka|label=Ahita Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} [[File:Ahita Shrine - DCBVeg0UIAYITuQ.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Shrine grounds}}]] '''Ahita Shrine''' (あびたじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Sakuragaoka, {{ill|lt=Minoh City|Q665097|qid=Q665097|1=Minoh}}, {{ill|lt=Osaka Prefecture|Q122723|qid=Q122723|1=Osaka Prefecture}}. It is identified with '''Ahita Shrine''' of {{ill|lt=Toyoshima District (Osaka Prefecture)|Q11633558|qid=Q11633558|lt=Toyoshima District|1=Teshima district}}, {{ill|lt=Settsu Province|Q864163|qid=Q864163|1=Settsu Province}}, which is listed in the '{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}'. During the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|qid=Q184963|1=Edo period}}, it was called '''Gozu Tennō'''. {{ill|lt=Susanoo|Q272993|qid=Q272993|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} is enshrined as the deity. Since Minoh is a producing area for yuzu citrus, visitors can draw a “yuzu omikuji,” a fortune slip shaped like a yuzu. [https://spicomi.net/media/articles/2730 Thorough coverage report on weddings and Shinto ceremonies at Ahita Shrine] === History === === Overview === According to shrine tradition, it was founded in the 3rd year of {{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|qid=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}}. In the “{{ill|lt=Engishiki|Q1342448|qid=Q1342448|1=Engishiki}}” {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|lt=Register of Deities|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}, compiled in the 5th year of {{ill|lt=Enchō (era)|Q1327274|qid=Q1327274|lt=Enchō|1=Enchō}} ({{ill|lt=927|Q30470|qid=Q30470|1=927}}), it is recorded as “Ahita Shrine, Major, Monthly and Niiname,” and it was stipulated that offerings would be presented at the imperial court’s {{ill|lt=Tsukinami Festival|Q11516161|qid=Q11516161|1=Tsukinami-no-Matsuri}} and {{ill|lt=Niiname Festival|Q11501518|qid=Q11501518|1=Niiname-no-Matsuri}}. Although it is currently enshrined in Sakuragaoka, Minoh City, it is said that the shrine buildings were formerly located north of the present {{ill|lt=Hankyu Minoo Line|Q246334|qid=Q246334|1=Hankyū Minoo Line}} {{ill|lt=Minoo Station|Q764602|qid=Q764602|1=Minoo Station}}. During the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|qid=Q184963|1=Edo period}}, it attracted widespread veneration and received {{ill|lt=heihaku (offerings)|Q11481885|qid=Q11481885|1=Hanpei}}. In the 5th year of {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|qid=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} ({{ill|lt=1872|Q7753|qid=Q7753|1=1872}}), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Modern shrine ranking system#Minor shrines|Q712534|qid=Q712534|lt=Village Shrine|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}, and in the 44th year ({{ill|lt=1911|Q2076|qid=Q2076|1=1911}}) it became a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shinsen Heihaku-ryō Kyōshinsha|1=UNKNOWN}}. In the 50th year of {{ill|lt=Shōwa|Q327567|qid=Q327567|1=Shōwa era}} ({{ill|lt=1975|Q2479|qid=Q2479|1=1975}}), the shrine buildings were rebuilt. === Divine rank === * 3rd year of {{ill|lt=Kashō|Q1373157|qid=Q1373157|1=Kashō}} ({{ill|lt=850|Q30364|qid=Q30364|1=850}}), {{ill|lt=January 22|Q2275|qid=Q2275|1=January 22}}, Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade ({{ill|lt=Shoku Nihon Kōki|Q1041301|qid=Q1041301|1=Shoku Nihon Kōki}}) — recorded as “Ahita-no-Kami.” === Notes === {{Notes help}} {{Reflist}} === External links === {{Commons|Category:Ahita-jinja}} * {{Official website|name=Ahita Shrine}} – Official website * [http://www.jinjacho-osaka.net/osakafunai-no-jinjya/dai1sibu/minou-city/m21_03_minou_ahita.htm Ahita Shrine] – Osaka Prefectural Association of Shinto Shrines {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ahita Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ahita Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Ahita Shrine]][[Category:Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]] [[Category:Kanpei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Settsu Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:祇園神社]] [[Category:Son-sha in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Settsu Province]] [[Category:箕面市の歴史]] [[Category:箕面市の建築物]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Settsu Province]] [[Category:Gion shrines]]
